[
	{"bbox_2d": [72, 65, 127, 87], "text_content": "ST"},
	{"bbox_2d": [817, 65, 926, 79], "text_content": "STUSB4500"},
	{"bbox_2d": [784, 83, 926, 94], "text_content": "Functional description"},
	{"bbox_2d": [72, 121, 86, 136], "text_content": "1"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 121, 417, 138], "text_content": "Functional description"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 161, 913, 228], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 is a USB Type-C™ and power delivery controller IC for sink applications. It is able to negotiate a power delivery contract with a source without MCU support (auto-run mode). It relies on proprietary algorithms and configurable PDO (power data objects) thanks to an integrated non-volatile memory. It supports dead battery mode to allow a system to be powered from an external source directly. Combined with its capability to negotiate directly a power contract, the STUSB4500 is the ideal controller device for autonomous systems requiring high power charging profile to be fully operational."},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 241, 351, 252], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 major role is to:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 257, 177, 267], "text_content": "1."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 257, 692, 268], "text_content": "Detect the connection between two USB Type-C ports (attach detection)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 273, 177, 283], "text_content": "2."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 273, 492, 283], "text_content": "Establish a valid source-to-sink connection"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 289, 177, 299], "text_content": "3."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 289, 567, 299], "text_content": "Determine the attached device mode: source or debug accessory"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 305, 177, 315], "text_content": "4."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 305, 827, 316], "text_content": "Resolve cable orientation and twist connections to establish USB data routing (MUX control)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 321, 177, 331], "text_content": "5."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 321, 712, 332], "text_content": "Negotiate a USB power delivery (PD) contract with a PD capable source device"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 337, 177, 347], "text_content": "6."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 337, 719, 348], "text_content": "Configure the incoming VBUS power path and the charging paths accordingly"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 353, 177, 363], "text_content": "7."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 353, 681, 364], "text_content": "Monitor the VBUS power path and manage the VBUS voltage transitions"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 369, 177, 379], "text_content": "8."},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 369, 448, 380], "text_content": "Handle the high voltage protections"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 386, 391, 396], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 also provides:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 405, 321, 416], "text_content": "Dead battery mode"},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 421, 565, 432], "text_content": "PDO (power data object) customization through NVM"},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 437, 511, 448], "text_content": "Internal and/or external VBUS discharge paths"},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 453, 441, 464], "text_content": "Dual high power charging path support"},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 469, 441, 480], "text_content": "Debug accessory mode detection"},
	{"bbox_2d": [211, 485, 789, 496], "text_content": "Customization of the device configuration through NVM to support specific applications"},
